visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a pink oversized hoodie, stands indoors in front of a white paneled door. She gestures towards her chest while speaking with an expressive facial expression. The lighting is bright and even. Graphics of Taiwanese night market snacks appear above her head. (2) The scene shifts to a medium full shot. The woman has changed her outfit to a white ribbed top and pink trousers. She is adjusting a light blue wearable plastic tray suspended from her shoulders by blue cords. She stands in a room with white walls and a visible umbrella leaning in the background. (3) The scene cuts to Ningxia Night Market in Taipei. The woman stands in the middle of a street lined with food stalls. She is wearing the blue tray, which now holds a bottle of blue-labeled water and some paper bags. People walk by in the background under a cloudy daylight sky. (4) In a series of rapid cuts, the woman is seen eating different foods at the market. Close-ups show her biting into a large stick of pig blood cake, using chopsticks to eat an oyster omelet from a box on her tray, and holding a fried chicken cutlet. Her expressions are joyful and exaggerated as she reacts to the flavors. (5) The weather changes to rainy; the woman is now holding a clear umbrella while continuing to eat sweet potato balls and fried milk. The lighting becomes more muted due to the overcast sky, but the market stalls' lights are visible. She holds the PH 9.0 water bottle and drinks from it. (6) The woman stands prominently in the frame, holding up the PH 9.0 bottle toward the camera. Large text overlays provide event information and promotional details. She smiles and waves at the camera while the background shows the evening bustle of the night market with glowing signs and moving crowds.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 韓國人在臺等了9年 才敢在夜市挑戰做這個?!. [Variety]: (韓國人). [Variety]: (住臺9年). (2) [Variety]: 其實呢. [Variety]: 我一直有一個跟台灣夜市有關的小小夢想. (3) [Variety]: 在夜市連續吃超過10種小吃. (4) [Variety]: 但每次都因為天氣太熱. [Variety]: 內用大排長龍. [Variety]: 每次中間去餐廳休息. [Variety]: 中途回飯店.... (5) [Subtitle]: 直到有一天我在網路上發現. [Subtitle]: 夜市的行動餐盤?. (6) [Subtitle]: 就是這個!!!. [Subtitle]: 馬上接著吃下一個食物!. [Subtitle]: 還能邊吃邊喝水欸!. (7) [Subtitle]: 立馬準備出門!. [Logo]: 吃美食 喝 PH9.0 鹼去負擔!. (8) [Subtitle]: 抵達寧夏夜市!. (9) [Subtitle]: 今天要在夜市吃幾個小吃?. [Subtitle]: 100個. [Subtitle]: 沒有 x2. [Subtitle]: 其實是10個. (10) [Subtitle]: 1. 豬血糕. [Subtitle]: 原來是這種味道?... [Subtitle]: 你沒吃過?. [Subtitle]: 沒吃過. (11) [Variety]: (我的菜欸~). [Subtitle]: 2. 蚵仔煎. [Subtitle]: 可能是因為很久沒吃了. [Subtitle]: 真的覺得超級好吃!. (12) [Subtitle]: 酥脆的太白粉裡加了蛋. [Subtitle]: 這家真的給超多蚵仔耶~. [Subtitle]: 你這樣沒有內用位子. [Subtitle]: 也可以很容易吃欸. (13) [Subtitle]: 真的!!!. [Subtitle]: 不需要等內用位子. [Variety]: (突然下雨). [Subtitle]: 可是我的雨傘怎麼了?. (14) [Variety]: (現在才發現). [Subtitle]: 但我覺得下雨天. [Subtitle]: 有這個行動餐盤真的剛好欸. (15) [Subtitle]: 3. 地瓜球. [Subtitle]: 這麼潮濕的天氣. [Subtitle]: 地瓜球居然外酥內Q. (16) [Subtitle]: 大家也喜歡加梅子粉吃嗎?. [Subtitle]: 請底下留言告訴我. (17) [Subtitle]: 4. 雞排. [Subtitle]: 其實我隨便在一家店點了雞排. [Subtitle]: 結果竟然超好吃. (18) [Subtitle]: 那個味道完全不輸韓國炸雞. [Subtitle]: 我愛你雞排~~~. [Variety]: (中間補充水). [Variety]: 讚. (19) [Subtitle]: 口渴的時候真的要喝. [Subtitle]: 統一PH9.0鹼性離子水喔. (20) [Subtitle]: 在台灣夏天的夜市. [Subtitle]: 就能隨時補水!. [Subtitle]: 超級方便. (21) [Subtitle]: 當然還有行動餐盤. [Subtitle]: 也是非常方便~. [Subtitle]: 可以解放雙手!!!. (22) [Subtitle]: 但可能有人會問. [Subtitle]: “歐膩~我家裡沒有那種東西”. [Subtitle]: “需要自己買嗎?”. (23) [Variety]: 先不要買!!!. [Subtitle]: 為了你們目前PH9.0就有準備. [Subtitle]: 超特別的夜市快閃活動. (24) [Slogan]: *活動資訊* 地點：寧夏夜市 (蓬萊國小大門前) 時間：8/29-8/31 晚上18:00-21:00. [Subtitle]: 只要遊戲成功就有機會取得. (25) [Subtitle]: 或濕紙巾 & 統一PH9.0 鹼性離子水 800ml 一瓶. [Subtitle]: 還有機會拿到. [Subtitle]: 夜市折價券等等贈品. (26) [Subtitle]: 詳細內容請參考文案喔~. [Subtitle]: 5. 大腸包小腸. [Variety]: (超大口). (27) [Subtitle]: 這家口味比較清淡一點. [Subtitle]: 有點小可惜. [Variety]: (好想加辣椒醬). (28) [Subtitle]: 6. 臭餛飩. [Subtitle]: 是裡面包了臭豆腐的炸餃子. [Subtitle]: 一開始我其實有點怕怕的. (29) [Subtitle]: 好吃!!!!. [Subtitle]: 聞起來超級臭豆腐味. [Subtitle]: 結果吃起來其實. (30) [Variety]: (外面還撒了咖哩粉，更清爽). [Subtitle]: 7. 蛋黃芋餅. [Subtitle]: 芋頭味不會有奇怪的腥味. [Subtitle]: 很加分!!!!. (31) [Subtitle]: 裡面還包含肉鬆，蛋黃. [Subtitle]: 有加肉鬆真的好好吃喔!. (32) [Subtitle]: 8. 大腸麵線. [Subtitle]: 這太累了. [Subtitle]: 有沒有人可以推薦一下. [Subtitle]: 夜市裡好吃的大腸麵線店啊. (33) [Subtitle]: 9. 炸鮮奶. [Subtitle]: 這是在韓國吃不到的點心!. [Subtitle]: 好燙喔!!. (34) [Variety]: (開始講外星語中). [Subtitle]: 10. 麻糬冰. [Subtitle]: 麻糬還是熱熱的!. (35) [Variety]: (這次又冷到不行). [Subtitle]: 我的天啊.... [Subtitle]: 但還是順利吃完甜點啦. (36) [Subtitle]: Q. 今天美食TOP3是什麼?. [Subtitle]: 我先不告訴排名. (37) [Subtitle]: 直接讓大家猜猜~ 歡迎底下留言!!!. [Subtitle]: 那大家夏天在外面吃東西的時候. (38) [Subtitle]: 別忘記顧體質~. [Subtitle]: 喝統一PH9.0鹼性離子水喔!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; multiple pedestrians, stall owners, and diners in the night market background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair. She wears a pink hoodie in the intro, then switches to a white sleeveless top and pink cargo pants for the outdoor segment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a simple indoor domestic setting with a white door. It then moves to the bustling Ningxia Night Market in Taipei, featuring numerous food stalls with colorful signs, steaming pots, and a crowd of people walking on an asphalt street during both daytime and evening.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female Mandarin speech begins immediately with a bright, upbeat pop synthesizer BGM. A 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as she mentions her dream. (2) A comical 'ding' sound effect punctuates her decision to go to the night market. The background environment shifts to an outdoor setting with a light bed of urban hum and distant crowd murmur. (3) A sequence of hard cuts begins, each marked by a distinct 'pop' or 'click' SFX as she moves between stalls. Audible crunching sounds (SFX) accompany her biting into the pig blood cake and fried chicken. (4) The ambient texture changes slightly with a soft, persistent pitter-patter sound of rain hitting an umbrella. The female voice remains high-arousal and energetic. (5) A sharp 'glug glug' sound effect plays as she drinks from the water bottle, followed by a 'ting' sound for emphasis. (6) The BGM continues at a steady 128 BPM tempo while the female voice shifts to a faster, more instructional tone during the promotional segment. A final 'ding' marks the appearance of event details.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Preparation -> Experience -> Product Integration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video document a Korean woman's challenge to eat 10 snacks at a Taipei night market using a specialized 'mobile tray.' It aims to showcase local food culture while promoting the PH 9.0 alkaline water as a necessary accompaniment to heavy night market eating.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator uses a customized tray with the brand logo, drinks the product on camera, provides a dedicated promotional segment with event details, and explicitly suggests the product helps with digestion ('鹼去負擔').

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high editing frequency and dense text overlays reflect a typical 'social-native' short-form video style intended for high engagement.
